title: Race with # delays ($fatal call with DPI when it looks like it shouldn't)
body:
Here is a reproducible example in a repository (Apache 2.0 licensed code taken from Rocket Chip): https://github.com/jackkoenig/verilator-fatal-issue#setup

I am very sorry that the example is so much Verilog and has additional dependencies on `riscv-isa-sim`. I tried very hard to reduce the test case further, including creating a testbench with just the problematic module (`TLMonitor_31`), but I could not reproduce the bug with just the one module (despite reproducing the timing on the modules ports exactly).

However, I did remove every single `$fatal` call except the 2 that seem related to the problem, so I hope it's reduced enough that the problem isn't that hard to see. I also deleted all of the extra `TLMonitors` so there's just the 1.

I saw the same behavior on several Verilator versions including git master: https://github.com/jackkoenig/verilator-fatal-issue#additional-information

If this is a bug, I primarily need to understand what causes it to manifest so that FIRRTL can emit Verilog that avoids it.
